## Curation Checks

- [ ] Organism identity is clear.
- [ ] Source provenance is clear.
- [ ] MIC or phenotype data are available.
- [ ] Genetic marker or genome data are available.
- [ ] Genotype and phenotype data are from the same isolate set.
- [ ] Supplementary files have been checked.
